docs.text: Ring Notify Ring Notify is an Android application (with iOS support coming soon) that allows users to send notifications to mobile phones and alert users via the phone call screen. Features Notification Alerts : Send notifications to mobile phones. Call Screen Alerts : Alert users via the phone call screen. API Integration : Easily integrate with the app using a REST API. Note for Contributors : Testing on iOS is welcome! The app is written using React Native, and all libraries should support iOS. Download You can download the APK from the GitHub Releases . Using the API Endpoint Send a call notification via the following REST API: URL : https://api.ringnotify.wtarit.me/notify/call Method : POST Headers : Authorization: Bearer <user API key> Content-Type: application/json Body : { "text": "<Message that you want to show on the call screen>" }
